description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head and a wooden handle. The head is composed of a cylindrical striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is slightly curved, made of dark-stained wood, and appears smooth with subtle grain patterns visible. The metal head has a matte, slightly worn finish, suggesting it is made of steel or iron. No visible branding, logos, or additional attachments are present on the hammer. The overall appearance is utilitarian and well-crafted, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a dark wooden handle and a steel head featuring a striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular striking face of the hammer head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the hammer head, including the flat striking face and the pronounced curved claw.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the hammer head and the back of the claw, with the handle's grain visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the hammer head and the curvature of the claw.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle with a smooth, polished finish and visible wood grain
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal, made of steel
